headings.text: Cosmetic Dentistry Services at AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, Bellevue, WA
The Role of Cosmetic Dentistry in Modern Dental Care
How Composite Fillings and Dental Bonding Work

paragraphs: Cosmetic dentistry helps improve teeth that are chipped, stained, or worn down. At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we focus on providing effective care to restore your teeth and make them look natural again. Our team is here to help with all your dental needs. Call us today at (425) 454-3221 to book your appointment now!

Cosmetic dentistry is about making teeth look better while keeping them healthy. Teeth can chip, stain, or wear down over time. When this happens, they may not function or appear as intended. Cosmetic treatments are made to cover, fix, or support these problems.

At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, every treatment is made to match the needs of each patient. Cosmetic care can mean small changes, like filling a gap, or bigger steps, like covering weak teeth with crowns.

Cosmetic dentistry is not just about how teeth look. It also helps balance the bite, protect weak spots, and stop further damage. Treatments are built to blend in with natural teeth, so they feel normal when chewing or talking.
This type of care makes teeth safer and stronger while also making them look better. That is why cosmetic dentistry is part of modern dental health, not just an extra.

Dental veneers are thin shells that cover the front of teeth to enhance their appearance. They can address issues like chips, stains, and uneven edges. Each veneer is custom-made to match the color and shape of the tooth, and a small layer of enamel is trimmed to ensure a flat fit.
Veneers improve the look of teeth without changing their position and come in two main types: porcelain, which is strong and stain-resistant, and composite, which can be applied more quickly.

Common reasons for getting veneers include:
Stains: Dark teeth that don't improve with whitening.
With proper care, veneers can last for many years and feel natural while chewing and speaking. At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, veneers protect teeth while enhancing their appearance.

Composite fillings and dental bonding are effective ways to repair teeth using tooth-colored materials that blend seamlessly with your natural smile. These procedures are quick and typically require minimal drilling.

Composite fillings are used to treat cavities and replace old silver fillings, customized to match your tooth color for a natural look. In contrast, dental bonding utilizes a soft resin to fix chips, cracks, or small gaps. The resin is shaped and hardened with a special light, restoring the tooth's smooth appearance.

Key advantages include:
Affordability, usually completed in one visit.
Both methods not only enhance appearance but also protect against further damage. Properly maintained, they can last many years while keeping your teeth strong and looking natural.

A dental crown is a protective cap that fully covers a tooth, often used for teeth that are weak, broken, or worn down. Made from durable materials like porcelain or ceramic, crowns mimic the appearance of natural teeth.

Crowns are used in the following scenarios:
A tooth has a large filling that needs support.
The process involves reshaping the tooth and taking an impression. A temporary crown may be placed until the permanent one is ready. At the next visit, the final crown is fitted and bonded securely.
Crowns help restore chewing function and protect the underlying tooth. With good care and regular checkups, they can last 10 years or more.
Modern advancements have transformed the field of cosmetic dentistry, making treatments faster, more precise, and more comfortable for patients.
Some of the most valuable tools include:

These innovations lead to fewer visits, eliminate guesswork, and deliver better results. For instance, digital scans can be used to design crowns that fit perfectly, while new resins enable fillings to blend in seamlessly.

At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we utilize these tools every day to achieve results that look natural, feel comfortable, and are durable. Patients benefit from care that is safer, quicker, and more reliable.
Clara H. Song, DDS

Dr. Clara Song is the founder of AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry. She provides gentle cosmetic and general dental care for families in Bellevue and Kirkland, Washington. Dr. Song earned her Doctor of Dental Surgery from Loma Linda University and received advanced training from the prestigious Las Vegas Institute for Advanced Dental Studies. She moved to Bellevue in 2007 to create the dental practice she had always dreamed of.

Dr. Eric Kim is the newest member of our dental team. Originally from the Pacific Northwest, he studied General Biology at the University of Washington and earned his DDS from Loma Linda University. Dr. Kim is committed to helping patients and staying up-to-date with the latest advancements in dentistry.

We accept payment via cash, check, credit cards, and financing plans. Our office also works with many insurance providers. Please call our office to see if we accept your plan. If your insurance does not cover the full cost of your care, we can help you find a suitable payment solution.
Schedule Your Consultation Today
If you have a damaged or weak tooth, don't wait. Cosmetic Dentistry can restore and protect your teeth for years to come.

AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry
11216 NE 15th St Suite A
Bellevue WA 98004
(425) 454-3221
